subcodes.title: The Tenth Principle—Equality of Sex: Words spoken on 1911-11-14 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Tenth Principle of the teaching of Baha'u'llah is the equality of the sexes. God has created all creatures in couples.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع کائنات موجوده مذکر و مونثند و در مابین ذکور و اناث آنها فرقی نیست نظر در
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @equality of men and women, @education of children; moral education
